title: rootless podman 3.1.0-3 fails on ubuntu 20.04
body:
/kind bug

**Description**

Hi,

I've just updated podman to version `3.1.0-3` from kubic repo and I can't build or run any containers anymore when running rootless. Everything works as expected as root. Previous version `3.0.1-2` was working without issues

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

```
$ podman run --rm -it docker.io/library/ubuntu:20.04 /bin/bash
Trying to pull docker.io/library/ubuntu:20.04...
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob a70d879fa598 done
Copying blob 10e6159c56c0 done
Copying blob c4394a92d1f8 done
Copying config 26b77e5843 done
Writing manifest to image destination
Storing signatures
  Error processing tar file(exit status 1): operation not permitted
Error: Error committing the finished image: error adding layer with blob "sha256:10e6159c56c084c858f5de2416454ac0a49ddda47b764e4379c5d5a147c9bf5f": Error processing tar file(exit status 1): operation not permitted
```
A similar error happens with the `build` command

If I try a different image, the error might be different:
```
$ podman run --rm -it docker.io/library/alpine:latest /bin/sh
Trying to pull docker.io/library/alpine:latest...
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob 540db60ca938 done
Copying config 6dbb9cc540 done
Writing manifest to image destination
Storing signatures
ERRO[0001] error unmounting /var/lib/jenkins/.local/share/containers/storage/overlay/098cb56fb191d235f7d901c535704825e97391d35985460dc70865c1ec0af784/merged: invalid argument
Error: error mounting storage for container bff2034f7fd9d951961bc7959caffaa03e7d026d4040ddaa047bdf3422a24985: error creating overlay mount to /var/lib/jenkins/.local/share/containers/storage/overlay/098cb56fb191d235f7d901c535704825e97391d35985460dc70865c1ec0af784/merged, mount_data=",lowerdir=/var/lib/jenkins/.local/share/containers/storage/overlay/l/V2L6SJXA74VDEOYBBBFC22DDFV,upperdir=/var/lib/jenkins/.local/share/containers/storage/overlay/098cb56fb191d235f7d901c535704825e97391d35985460dc70865c1ec0af784/diff,workdir=/var/lib/jenkins/.local/share/containers/storage/overlay/098cb56fb191d235f7d901c535704825e97391d35985460dc70865c1ec0af784/work,userxattr": invalid argument
```

From `dmesg` I can see errors like:
```
overlayfs: unrecognized mount option "volatile" or missing value
```

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
Version:      3.1.0
API Version:  3.1.0
Go Version:   go1.15.2
Built:        Wed Dec 31 16:00:00 1969
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
```

**Package info (e.g. output of `rpm -q podman` or `apt list podman`):**

```
podman/unknown,now 100:3.1.0-3 amd64 [installed]
```

**Have you tested with the latest version of Podman and have you checked the Podman Troubleshooting Guide?**

Yes

**Additional environment details (AWS, VirtualBox, physical, etc.):**

Running on a DigitalOcean Ubuntu 20.04 droplet with latest patches

comments.body:
this is fixed with https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/871

as a temporary workaround please make sure fuse-overlayfs is used as mount_program

> as a temporary workaround please make sure fuse-overlayfs is used as mount_program

Thanks Giuseppe,

adding this to `~/.config/containers/storage.conf` temporarily fixed it:
```
[storage]
  driver = "overlay"
  [storage.options]
    mount_program = "/usr/bin/fuse-overlayfs"
```
